positive: A mesmerizing, stylized illustration of a cosmic celestial body (like a stylized moon or planet) floating above a calm, minimalist landscape. The subject is a giant, luminous crescent moon shedding glowing nebulae dust onto stylized mountains and deep ocean waves. The style should be highly detailed vector art combined with ethereal watercolor washes, featuring deep indigo, sapphire blue, gold, and vibrant cyan color palette. Composition must be central and symmetrical, utilizing strong negative space for a clean, graphic look. Emphasize clean silhouettes, glowing particle effects, and perfect symmetry for apparel printing. Rule of thirds for the horizon line. Minimalist, high-contrast, graphic novel quality.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, human, face, messy, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, poor composition, grain, jpeg artifacts
